feat.name: Prolific Prophet Spellcasting
feat.text: Increase the number of spells in your repertoire and the number of spell slots you gain from prophet of Kalistrade archetype feats by 1 for each spell rank other than your two highest prophet of Kalistrade spell slots.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
